scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run ensure:deps && pnpm --filter @workspace/app run build
scripts.build:dev: pnpm run ensure:deps && pnpm --filter @workspace/app run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/app run typecheck
